reviews.comment:
Un lugar agradable en una ubicación privilegiada para tomar un café, desayunar o esperar a los amigos. Lorena (lo MAS).

(Translated by Google)
A lovely spot in a prime location for coffee, breakfast, or waiting for friends. Lorena (the best).

reviewReply.comment: Gracias Patricio, nos alegra saber que estas muy a gusto y conforme con la atención recibida. Te esperamos nuevamente..!

reviews.comment:
Muy rebuscada la ubicación.
Un 3 solamente por el personal. Buena onda

(Translated by Google)
The location is really hard to find. I'd give it a 3 only because of the staff. They were nice.

reviews.comment:
poca gente atendiendo siempre,  tardan mucho! y nisiquiera limpian los vidrios..antes te preguntaban por todo..cada vez peor...

(Translated by Google)
There are never enough people working, they take forever! And they don't even clean the windows... they used to ask you about everything... it's getting worse and worse...

reviews.comment:
Los playeros son muy lerdos, poco atentos, yo venía viajando y ni siquiera me ofrecieron limpiar los vidrios.

(Translated by Google)
The beach attendants are very slow and inattentive. I was traveling and they didn't even offer to clean the windows for me.
